title.rendered: Data Analyst Internship 2026 by Wikasta Business and Technical Solutions Pvt. Ltd. | Work From Home Opportunity

content.rendered:
Data Analyst Internship 2026: Are you looking for a Work From Home Data Analyst Internship in 2026? Here’s an exciting opportunity from Wikasta Business and Technical Solutions Pvt. Ltd. for students, freshers, and recent graduates who want to gain practical experience in data analytics and business intelligence.

Internship Overview

About the Internship

The Data Analyst Internship offers an excellent opportunity to work with real-world datasets and develop analytical skills that are highly valued in today’s job market. Interns will collaborate with team members, create reports, analyze trends, and support data-driven decision-making processes.

Whether you’re a student looking to build your resume or a fresher aiming to enter the analytics field, this internship can help you gain valuable industry exposure.

Roles and Responsibilities

Selected interns will:

  • Collect, clean, and organize datasets from multiple sources.
  • Perform Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to identify patterns and trends.
  • Create charts, dashboards, and visual reports.
  • Support the team in preparing data-driven presentations.
  • Research industry trends and best practices in analytics.
  • Assist in improving internal workflows and reporting systems.
  • Participate in team meetings and project discussions.
  • Contribute ideas to solve business problems using data.

Eligibility Criteria

Candidates who meet the following requirements can apply:

  • Undergraduate students
  • Postgraduate students
  • Engineering students
  • Freshers
  • Recent graduates
  • Candidates interested in Data Analytics and Business Intelligence

Required Skills

Mandatory Skills

  • Basic knowledge of Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets
  • Good analytical thinking
  • Problem-solving ability
  • Strong willingness to learn

Preferred Skills

  • SQL
  • Python
  • Data Visualization Tools
  • Basic Statistics

Benefits of This Internship

Work From Home

Work remotely from anywhere in India.

Flexible Hours

Manage your work schedule alongside your studies.

Practical Learning

Gain hands-on experience with real business datasets.

Career Growth

Build a strong foundation for future roles in:

  • Data Analyst
  • Business Analyst
  • Data Scientist
  • Reporting Analyst
  • MIS Executive

Why Choose Data Analytics?

Data Analytics is among the fastest-growing career fields globally. Companies rely on data to make informed business decisions, creating significant demand for skilled analysts.

This internship helps candidates:

  • Develop industry-relevant skills
  • Build a professional portfolio
  • Improve employability
  • Gain practical project experience
  • Understand real-world business challenges

How to Apply?

Interested candidates can apply through the official Unstop opportunity page:

👉 Apply Here: https://unstop.com/o/UbVCGoN?lb=Pxe8wppP&utm_medium=Share&utm_source=internships&utm_campaign=Abhismau15384

also read :Google Operations Center Apprenticeship Program 2026: Apply Online for Fresh Graduates

Conclusion

The Data Analyst Internship 2026 by Wikasta Business and Technical Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is a great opportunity for students and freshers looking to enter the world of data analytics. With flexible work hours, remote working, and hands-on industry experience, this internship can be a valuable stepping stone toward a successful analytics career.

Since there are only 3 openings available, interested candidates should apply as soon as possible.
